facebook.content: Faith is built in the storm vs. Faith is built in the stillness - which has been true for you? Have you ever found yourself in the midst of turmoil and somehow your faith got stronger, or did you discover your faith after experiencing peace and quietness?
facebook.fullPost:
Faith is built in the storm vs. Faith is built in the stillness - which has been true for you? Have you ever found yourself in the midst of turmoil and somehow your faith got stronger, or did you discover your faith after experiencing peace and quietness?

facebook.pullQuote: Faith is built in the storm.

instagram.content:
Real Talk: When life gets tough, do you find yourself trying to fix the problem or trusting God to rewrite the script? Which one comes naturally to you? 

 Double tap if you're still figuring it out
